hockett-chelsey.text: Chelsey Alexandra Hockett (Democratic) is a candidate for U.S. Representative, TX-05.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Chelsey Alexandra Hockett had raised $11,105 and spent $-9,690 for this campaign.
No public voting record in our set for Chelsey Alexandra Hockett (not currently a member of Congress).

gooden-lance.text: Lance Gooden (Republican) is the current officeholder running for U.S. Representative, TX-05.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Lance Gooden had raised $1,170,230 and spent $554,887 for this campaign.

On 7-Jan-2025, Lance Gooden voted Yea on H R 29. A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

base.summary: This is the U.S. House race for TX-05. In the most recent election (2024-11-05), Lance Gooden (REP) won by about 28.17 points out of 299897 votes cast. The bullets below summarize each current candidate's public finance and voting-record data where available.
base.caveats: This summary only includes facts found in our sourced dataset (FEC finance filings and U.S. House Clerk roll-call votes). It omits anything we could not verify from those sources. No public data in our set on any candidate's policy positions for this race (the positions field was empty for every candidate as of this build). No public data in our set on Chelsey Alexandra Hockett's policy positions. No public data in our set on Lance Gooden's policy positions.
